name: Silver Tongue

sourceReferences.note: Tasha's Cauldron of Everything / Mythic Odysseys of Theros

rulesText.description: Official College of Eloquence feature: when you make a Charisma (Deception) or Charisma (Persuasion) check, a d20 roll of 9 or lower counts as a 10.

desc: Official College of Eloquence feature: when you make a Charisma (Deception) or Charisma (Persuasion) check, a d20 roll of 9 or lower counts as a 10.
